design_philosophy.core_concept: Linear-style Technical Dashboard. High density, high contrast, precision tools.
design_philosophy.visual_style: Dark void backgrounds, 1px subtle borders, electric accent colors, monospace data points.

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Modal titles. Tracking-tight.

mono.usage: Data points, URLs, Metrics, Status codes (404, 200).

layout_strategy.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, but doubled for section gaps (py-12).
layout_strategy.card_style: Flat background (#121214), 1px border (#27272A), No Shadow (or very subtle inner glow).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(34,197,94,0.2)] transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground text-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border rounded-lg p-6
cards.interactive: hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer group relative overflow-hidden

inputs.base: bg-background border-border focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary rounded-md h-10 px-3 text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 font-mono

tables.header: text-muted-foreground bg-muted/30 uppercase text-xs font-mono tracking-wider h-10

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text is APCA compliant (minimum Lc 60 for body text).
accessibility.interactive_states: Focus rings must be visible (2px primary ring offset 2px).
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. All decorative motion has aria-hidden='true'.
accessibility.text_scaling: Ensure UI does not break at 200% zoom.

implementation_rules.file_structure: Components in /src/components/ui. Pages in /src/pages. Layouts in /src/layouts.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME ENFORCEMENT: The app is DARK MODE ONLY. Ensure 'dark' class is applied to the root/html element by default. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless explicitly asked, or hide it deep in settings.
2. TYPOGRAPHY: Import 'Manrope' for headings and 'Inter' for body from Google Fonts. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for anything related to URLs, Metrics, or Code snippets.
3. LAYOUT: Create a 'DashboardLayout' component that includes a fixed left Sidebar (width 64px collapsed, 240px expanded) and a top Navbar. The main content area should have 'p-6' or 'p-8'.

4. NAVIGATION: The Sidebar should have icons for: Dashboard (Home), Guest Post Finder (Search), Broken Link Builder (Link), Competitor Analysis (BarChart2), Directory Manager (Folder), Outreach (Mail), Settings (Settings).
5. DATA TABLES: This is a data-heavy app. Use dense tables. Add 'whitespace-nowrap' to table cells to prevent ugly wrapping. Use tooltips for truncated content.
6. STATUS INDICATORS: Use small colored dots (w-2 h-2 rounded-full) next to status text (e.g., Green for 'Live', Red for 'Dead', Yellow for 'Pending').
7. FORMS: Input fields should be 'h-10' (standard) or 'h-9' (dense). Add subtle 'focus:ring-1' and 'focus:ring-primary'. Avoid default browser outlines.
8. EMPTY STATES: Use the provided 'empty_states' images when a list is empty (e.g., No campaigns found). Overlay a clear CTA button.
9. TOASTS: Use 'sonner' for all notifications (Success: Campaign started, Error: Failed to fetch). Position: 'bottom-right'.
10. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, links). Format: 'kebab-case' (e.g., 'guest-post-search-button').
11. UNIVERSAL RULES: Do not use 'transition: all'. Use specific transitions (e.g., 'transition-colors duration-200'). Avoid 'text-align: center' on the app root.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this. Make it look like a 'Hacker Tool' or 'Pro Dashboard'.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for the Sidebar and Sticky Headers.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Subtle grain textures or noise overlays can add a premium feel to the background.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons. Use lucide-react icons instead.
